lines.speaker: Spirit Angler
lines.text: Oh sorry, I was somewhere else entirely!

lines.speaker: Spirit Angler
lines.text: I'm just watching the debris wash up at the shore here.

lines.speaker: Spirit Angler
lines.text: Oh, yes! All sorts of things get washed up by the storms. Aside from the usual materials, I've seen some interesting trinkets including odd looking books and fish preservation barrels.

lines.speaker: Spirit Angler
lines.text: If you help in the fight against Tempoross, the Captain's said you can help yourself to anything that washes up.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll keep an eye out, thank you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have a spare fishing net I could have?

sections.title: Attempting to Net a Reward pool with no fishing net

lines.speaker: Spirit Angler
lines.text: A net may be of use to you. Speak to me if you need one.
